release_notes: V14.44 build 205 mini trend layout polish patch: removes the 7-segment glucose font from the Glucose + 1-Hour Live Trend screen, uses the same smooth glucose font style as the other screens, widens the glucose card, reduces the 1-hour trend card proportionally, moves the glucose value lower and centred so three-digit values with a decimal point fit cleanly, keeps arrow and delta beside the 1-hour trend title, keeps the 12/12 cache text hidden, and preserves the build 204 OTA finalize/reboot logic plus existing WiFi, Nightscout, trend buffer, IOB, COB, SAGE and audio alarm logic.
